context: Hard: error interceptor refactor silently swallows 401 responses — Promise.resolve instead of Promise.reject makes auth failures appear as successful API calls

checklist.name: Catches 401 silently resolved as success
checklist.description: Identifies that the error interceptor handles status 401 with Promise.resolve(error.response) instead of Promise.reject, meaning callers receive the 401 error data as a successful response. Auth failures will appear to succeed with garbage/error data.

checklist.name: Catches removed auth redirect behavior
checklist.description: Identifies that the old handleUnauthorized() function (which cleared tokens and redirected to login) has been replaced with a log warning and silent resolve, breaking the auth recovery flow

checklist.name: Risk classified red
checklist.description: PR is classified as red due to auth/security behavior change that silently breaks authentication handling
